name: Agent Fleet
description: A managed fleet of LangGraph agents (ops-triage, fix-proposer, health-reporter): catalog, run with a live graph + timeline, human-in-the-loop approve/resume, and LangSmith tracing. Built-in; needs the langgraph extra installed plus an Anthropic key.
author: Agenius AI Labs

secrets_required.description: Anthropic API key the agents run on. The assistant may already hold it.
Optional. Set with LANGSMITH_TRACING=true to trace runs in LangSmith.
